description: Master index of all SMMFactory campaigns. Each campaign follows a standard lifecycle.

lifecycle.description: Best-practice campaign phases from ideation to completion. Every campaign must progress through these in order.

phases.name: 💡 Ideation
phases.description: Define the brief, concept, target audience, and success criteria. Answer: What are we doing and why?

phases.name: 🔍 Research
phases.description: Market intelligence, competitor analysis, audience insights, keyword/hook discovery. SEMrush adds SEO + PPC keyword and competitor data.

phases.name: 📋 Planning
phases.description: Strategy document, budget allocation, channel mix, timeline, and action calendar.

phases.name: 🎨 Creative
phases.description: Asset production — ad copy, visuals, landing pages, video, content calendar.
phases.gate: All assets produced and match brand DNA

phases.name: ✅ Review
phases.description: Four-eyes gate — human + automated verification before anything goes live.
phases.gate: All checklist items passed, stakeholder sign-off

phases.name: 🚀 Launch
phases.description: Activate channels — deploy ads, publish content, send broadcasts, go live.

phases.name: 📈 Optimize
phases.description: Monitor performance, A/B test, reallocate budget, pause underperformers, double down on winners.
phases.gate: Campaign hitting KPI targets or adjusted

phases.name: 🏁 Close
phases.description: Wind down spend, compile results, write retrospective, extract learnings for next campaign.

phase_progress.creative: 🟡 ad copy ready (Meta 6 ads + Google PMax assets) — images not selected

phase_progress.research: ⬜ skipped — no property to crawl, targets identified manually
phase_progress.creative: ✅ complete — 6 LinkedIn posts drafted, profile copy ready
phase_progress.launch: ✅ complete — launch_log.md generated, posts and outreach started
phase_progress.optimize: 🔴 in progress — tracking connections and engagement

conventions.addressing: Use the campaign slug or ref code when giving instructions. Example: 'for KLEst: update the ad copy'
conventions.structure: Each campaign folder contains: Campaign_Summary.md, action_calendar.md, creative/, research/ (if applicable)
conventions.ambiguity: If no slug is specified and context is unclear, the agent MUST ask which campaign before proceeding.
conventions.new_campaign: Every new campaign starts at 'ideation' phase. Create a campaign_brief.md using the template from strategy_foundations.md.
conventions.strategy_foundations: ./research/strategy_foundations.md — Hormozi (Value Equation, Grand Slam Offer, Core Four) + Priestley (5 Ps, Oversubscribed, 7-11-4, Scorecard). Every campaign MUST be evaluated against these frameworks.
